user_story: As an Employee, I want to see Announcements on the Home screen, so that I stay informed about company updates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am logged in; When I open the Home screen; Then I see the Announcements section

user_story: As an Employee, I want the Home screen to act as my landing page after login, so that I can access key information in one place
acceptance_criteria: Given I have logged into the HRMS; When I am redirected to the Home screen; Then the page loads with my relevant content such as Announcements
